sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73940" key="o)mfaki/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀμφᾰκ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73940.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cup of the acorn</tr_> of Valonia oak, used for tanning, and as an astringent medicine, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
